title: Verilator 3.856 errors on reserved words as struct members Verilator 3.850 did not

features.name: packed_struct_with_cpp_reserved_word_member
features.description: Code should include a packed struct typedef with a member whose name is a C++ reserved word like 'vector'
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic[31:0] vector; } test;

features.name: struct_member_assignment
features.description: Code should include assignment to a struct member accessed via dot notation
